title: Spacing & grid
lede: A single 8-unit spacing scale governs all rhythm. The page grid is a 12-column track at desktop, scaling down to 8 columns on tablet and 4 on mobile.

scale.title: Spacing scale
scale.desc: Multiples of 8px. Use semantic tokens like --space-3 rather than raw pixel values — consistent rhythm across all surfaces.

grid.title: Grid system
grid.desc: 12-column responsive grid with a 1280px max width on desktop.
